const errorStatusCodeSchema = z
  .number()
  .int()
  .min(400)
  .max(599)
  .refine((val) => val >= 400 && val < 600, { message: 'Must be a valid error status code (400-599)' });

type ZodError<T extends ZodSchema> = T extends v4.$ZodType
  ? v4.$ZodError<v4.output<T>>
  : v3.ZodError

type ZodValidatorFailureBody<T extends ZodSchema> = T extends v4.$ZodType
  ? Extract<v4ZodSafeParseResult<v4.output<T>>, { success: false }>
  : T extends v3.ZodType
    ? Extract<v3.SafeParseReturnType<v3.input<T>, v3.output<T>>, { success: false }>
    : never

db.run('UPDATE cross_seed_config SET last_run = ? WHERE instance_id = ?', [
	Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000),
	options.instanceId,
])

const asciiFallback =
    safeFilename
      .normalize("NFKD")
      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
      .replace(/[\\/]/g, "-")
      .replace(/[^\x20-\u7E]+/g, "_")
      .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
      .trim() || "file";
